characters.appearance: A South Asian woman in her late 20s or early 30s with a medium build and fair complexion. She has long, dark, wavy hair tied back in a low ponytail. Her facial features are soft, with dark eyes and a small bindi on her forehead.
characters.wardrobe: A shimmering pink saree with a short-sleeved pink blouse. She wears small gold hoop earrings and a simple gold bangle on her right wrist.
characters.demeanor: Initially appears dutiful and reserved, but becomes confident, assertive, and proud as she explains her newfound skills.

characters.appearance: A South Asian man in his late 20s or early 30s with a slim build and a light brown complexion. He has dark, styled hair, a short beard and mustache, and wears dark-rimmed glasses. He has several beaded bracelets on his right wrist.
characters.wardrobe: A brown, button-up, long-sleeved kurta-style shirt and white trousers.
characters.demeanor: Initially condescending and skeptical, he becomes surprised, impressed, and then enthusiastic.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: ये लो, इस महीने के घर का खर्च। [Here, this is for this month's household expenses.]

Character A says: इट्स ओके, आप रख लो, मेरे पास है। [It's okay, you keep it, I have money.]

Character B says: अरे, तुम्हारे पास पैसे कहां से आए? [Hey, where did you get money from?]

Character A says: मैं आजकल मोहल्ले के बच्चों को ट्यूशन पढ़ा रही हूं, यह मेरी पहली कमाई है। [These days I'm giving tuitions to the neighborhood kids, this is my first earning.]

Character B says: पर तुम्हें तो खुद टूटी-फूटी इंग्लिश आती है, तुम क्या सिखा पाओगी? [But you yourself know broken English, what will you be able to teach?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer with a relatable domestic scenario about household expenses.
- Establishes the wife's desire for financial independence.
- Introduces the core problem: the husband's doubt about her English skills, representing societal judgment.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Yeh lo
ghar ka kharcha
It's okay
Mere paas hai
Aare
paise kaha se
Main aaj kal mohalle
ko tuition
padha rahi hu
par tumhe toh khud
English aati hai
kya sikha paogi

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently now. I practice every day, and I can easily teach the kids. [For your information, I can speak English fluently and confidently now. I practice every day, and I can easily teach the kids.]

Character B says: अरे, इतनी अच्छी इंग्लिश कैसे सीखी? [Hey, how did you learn such good English?]

Character A says: मैंने Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड किया है। इसके AI ट्यूटर के साथ मैं रोज़ रियल-लाइफ सिचुएशंस की प्रैक्टिस करती हूँ। और अब मेरा कॉन्फिडेंस एकदम बढ़ गया है। [I downloaded the Supernova app. With its AI tutor, I practice real-life situations every day. And now my confidence has completely increased.]

Character B says: AI ट्यूटर? पर फीस कितनी है? [AI tutor? But how much is the fee?]

Character A says: बहुत ही अफोर्डेबल है! [It's very affordable!]

Character B says: क्या बात कर रही हो? फिर तो मैं भी आज ही ट्राई करूंगा। मुझे भी ऑफिस की मीटिंग्स में इंग्लिश की ज़रूरत पड़ती है। [What are you saying? Then I will also try it today. I also need English in office meetings.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Delivers the payoff where the wife proves her English proficiency.
- Introduces Supernova as the practical solution for daily speaking practice.
- Broadens the appeal by showing the husband realizing the app can help his career too.

scenes.supernova_script: Character A says: क्या आप भी बिना झिझक इंग्लिश बोलना चाहते हैं? तो आज ही Supernova ऐप डाउनलोड करें और रोज़ प्रैक्टिस शुरू करें। [Do you also want to speak English without hesitation? Then download the Supernova app today and start practicing daily.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Breaks the fourth wall to speak directly to the target audience.
- Provides a clear, encouraging call to action to download Supernova.
- Focuses on the realistic goal of speaking without hesitation through daily practice.
